calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Aug-12-2020 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2020 Set For Trial On Aug-17-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Status Conference (Shareholder'S Meeting)
Off Calendar Nov-21-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

There being no appearance, the Status Conference (Shareholder'S Meeting) is ordered off calendar.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.

Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion And Motion For Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Nov-07-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

PLAINTIFF CALIFORNIA CLUB OF CALIFORNIA's Motion For Preliminary Injunction.

Order To Show Cause Re: Preliminary Injunction (Specially Set At 1:30 Pm Per Ex Parte Order Filed 10/08/19)
Off Calendar Nov-07-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Marco Quazzo, Esq., C. Griffith Towle, Esq. 415-956-1900 of Bartko Zankel Bunzel for Plaintiff.
Dominic Signorotti, Esq., Ericka McKenna, Esq. 925-433-5448 of McKenna Brink Signorotti for Plaintiff California Club of California.
John "JR" Richards, Esq. 925-231-8104 of Richards Law for Defendant Marilyn Tiernan

RULING - A R G U E D. Hearing is held. 1:30 pm. The Court suggests a different approach, summarizes the legal problem, discussess each motion, and proposes a way through the problems which will satisfy everyone. The Court announces Corporations Code 600(c), hands out copies of its proposal and takes a break at 2:00 pm.

3:21 pm. The Court reconvenes. Atty. McKenna informs the Court the parties have reached an agreement. Atty. Richards reports parties have agreed to conduct a meeting and recites its agreements. Atty. Quazzo recites additional conditions, deadlines and issues. Atty. Signorotti asks the Court's availability on 11/21/19. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript) The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

Order To Show Cause Re: Plaintiff's Motion for a Preliminary Injunction.

The Temporary restraining Order remains in effect. The two motions are off-calendar. The parties have reached an agreement as stated fully in the reporter's transcript. Parties to submit a stipulation and proposed order to the Court. In addition, the Court will have a status conference on 11/21/19 at 3:30 pm in Dept. 302. (as fully reported in the reporter's notes/transcript)

3:42 pm. The Court is adjourned.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, maria.torreano@gmail.com, Reported. =(302/EPS)
